introSection: Roar-O-Saurus is a wooden roller coaster located at Story Land in Glen, New Hampshire, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Roar-O-Saurus was announced at the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA, where the lead car was also unveiled. The ride opened on May 24, 2014.

fullText:
Roar-O-Saurus is a wooden roller coaster located at Story Land in Glen, New Hampshire, USA.

Roar-O-Saurus was announced at the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA, where the lead car was also unveiled. The ride opened on May 24, 2014.
